# Copilot Instructions

This is a general-purpose scratch workspace — not a structured software project.

## Context

- There is no build system, test framework, or linting setup.
- Files here may be throwaway experiments, prototypes, or one-off scripts in any language.
- There is no consistent architecture or convention to follow.

## How to help

- Treat each request independently; don't assume continuity between sessions.
- When creating files, prefer self-contained scripts that run without external dependencies unless the user specifies otherwise.
- If the user asks to prototype something, keep it simple and runnable.
